# @qvac/registry-schema v0.3.0 Release Notes

📦 **NPM:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/@qvac/registry-schema/v/0.3.0

This release upgrades the registry HyperDB layer to HyperDB 6. The schema package now declares `hyperdb@^6.7.0` as a direct dependency, and the compiled HyperDB/Hyperdispatch specs are regenerated for the v6 toolchain. The public `RegistryDatabase` API is unchanged.

---

## 🔧 Changed

### HyperDB 6 dependency and regenerated specs

`hyperdb@^6.7.0` is now a direct dependency (replacing the HyperDB 4 peer range from v0.2.0). The autogenerated specs under `spec/` are rebuilt with the HyperDB 6 compiler output. No changes to `RegistryDatabase`, constants, or helper exports — consumers bump the package version and npm resolves HyperDB transitively.
